decisions.reasoning: Incineroar is threatened with an OHKO by Close Combat and a 2HKO by Surging Strikes. Amoonguss resists both of Urshifu-Rapid's STAB types, making it the safest pivot to neutralize the immediate threat.

Urshifu-Rapid Strike is a significant threat, and Spore is the most effective way to neutralize it immediately. Even if the opponent switches, putting a potential switch-in to sleep provides valuable momentum.
Urshifu-Rapid-Strike is already asleep, so I will re-apply Spore to ensure it stays incapacitated while it is forced to stay in or switch out.
Urshifu-Rapid-Strike is already asleep, and since Amoonguss is significantly slower, Spore is the best play to keep it incapacitated if it wakes up or to reset the sleep counter if it stays in.
The opponent's Urshifu-Rapid is already asleep, and Spore is the most effective way to keep it neutralized or catch a switch-in, as Amoonguss survives the potential Close Combat.

The opponent's Urshifu is already asleep, and since Spore is a status move, it will fail, but it is the safest play to maintain position while the opponent is forced to either stay in and waste a turn or switch out into a disadvantageous matchup.
Amoonguss is threatened with an OHKO by Flare Blitz and cannot effectively damage Incineroar. Switching to my own Incineroar provides a safe pivot that resists the opponent's primary threat.
Since the opponent's Incineroar is asleep, I can safely pivot out to gain momentum and bring in a more threatening attacker while lowering the opponent's stats.
The opponent's Incineroar is asleep, making this a free turn to remove its item and deal chip damage without fear of retaliation.

High Horsepower is a 2HKO on Incineroar and is the most efficient way to remove it from the field. Since Incineroar is currently asleep, I can safely attack without fear of being hit by Flare Blitz or Knock Off this turn.
Incineroar is at 20% HP, meaning High Horsepower will easily secure the KO this turn, preventing it from pivoting or dealing further damage.

Urshifu-Rapid is currently asleep, and Spore is the most effective way to keep it neutralized or reset the sleep timer if it wakes up, as Amoonguss has no meaningful offensive pressure here.

Amoonguss is at 34% and Rillaboom threatens a 3HKO with U-turn or Knock Off, while Amoonguss only 2HKOs. Switching to Incineroar provides an Intimidate drop and a safe resist to Rillaboom's Grass/Dark moves, preserving Amoonguss for potential redirection later.
Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, fulfilling the primary decision priority to secure the KO immediately.
